## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Sulaman Ahmed for the Publishing Operations Specialist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves technical account management, troubleshooting publisher connections, and being the "last mile human in the loop" before content goes live](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Sulaman has strong technical background as a full-stack developer, specializing in integrations and automations](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Opportunity for role to evolve, potentially including building publishing pipelines in the future](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Sulaman showed enthusiasm for solving real-world problems and learning new technologies in the AI field](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Expectations

  - [Andi manages customer operations team of directors overseeing account interactions](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Role sits between engineering and content teams, focusing on technical account management and support](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Responsibilities include troubleshooting publisher workflows, making updates, and ensuring proper formatting](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Goal is to scale both content generation and publishing processes](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Role may evolve to include building publishing pipelines in the future](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### Sulaman's Background and Interest

  - [Full-stack software developer specializing in integrations, automations, and AI](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Created a test product for GrowthX to track team productivity and app usage](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Excited about solving real-world problems and scaling up content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Interested in the mix of content and technical aspects of the role](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### Problem-Solving Approach

  - [Keeps a notepad with bullet points for tasks and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Proactively identifies and solves problems when faced with uncertainty](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Example: Developed a creative solution for Upwork image scraping challenge, using multi-threading to overcome time limitations](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### First Day Priorities

  - [Centralize and synchronize the publishing system to reduce ambiguities between teams](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Implement AI to check for common issues before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Improve communication about article status and readiness for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Review current processes and look for areas of improvement](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

### Communication and Workflow

  - [Daily updates via Geekbox in Slack channels](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [Weekly one-on-ones with Andi (more frequent in the first week)](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Alignment with client ops engineering team's bi-weekly sprint cycles](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Focus on documenting processes and creating guidelines for troubleshooting](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sulaman to review engineering team's current work on publishing pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Compile and review standard practices and SOPs](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Identify areas for improvement in current processes](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Create documentation and video tutorials for publishing processes](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Marylea to provide feedback on next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/J8qBzJoYZhLcDfNK5aZTku-u8sQxzcLY?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
